programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier agrees to make a television commercial for his candidate of choice in a local election, only to learn some very distressing information moments before they film.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard angers the university and the physics community when he gives an embarrassing radio interview; Bernadette and Amy compare their successes at work.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard and Bernadette are disappointed when they find out the sex of the baby. Leonard is annoyed when his mother befriends Penny.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With The Soap Opera Party
programme.desc: Joey throws a cast party on the roof of his building where he ends up making out with an attractive professor that Ross had a crush on.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With The Fertility Test
programme.desc: Ross is in agony because Charlie is dating Joey. Meanwhile, Chandler and Monica visit a fertility clinic.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Disappointed to learn that they cannot conceive a baby naturally, Monica and Chandler mull their options. Meanwhile, while shopping with Phoebe, Rachel confides that she is in love with Joey.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: It's Thanksgiving, and Chris talks John into having a holiday dinner - just the two of them, but it soon turns into a much bigger, family affair.

programme.title: Good Chef Bad Chef
programme.desc: Good Chef Bad Chef presents viewers with a range of both healthy and indulgent recipes and meal ideas and lets them decide what is right for them.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier takes a date to Bora Bora and runs into someone unexpected.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Jealousy rears its ugly head when Frasier bumps into Lilith and her new boyfriend while vacationing with his new girlfriend.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy records Sheldon talking in his sleep and tries to convince him that he has a more laid-back side. Meanwhile, Raj and Stuart compete to win the heart of Bernadette's new co-worker.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Raj don't react well when Amy enlists Howard's help on a project. Penny discovers the secret to managing a high-maintenance genius.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel's Sister Baby-Sits
programme.desc: Rachel believes her annoying, self-indulgent younger sister, Amy, is on the verge of changing her attitude. To help her become more responsible, Rachel allows Amy to babysit.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross has the chance to receive a grant, but must break up with Charlie to get it. Phoebe tries to give a hideous painting to Monica and Rachel.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With The Home Study
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler fuss over their apartment as they expect a visit from the adoption worker. Meanwhile, Phoebe and Mike opt for a small wedding and donate the extra money to a children's charity.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Wil Wheaton go head to head for the role of the new Professor Proton. Penny takes care of Halley when Bernadette and Howard are on bed rest.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Bert asks Sheldon to collaborate on a project with him, Sheldon becomes worried about others finding out because he thinks geology is beneath him. Raj seeks advice after reconnecting with Ruchi.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Howard are furious when they learn that Sheldon went to work with the military behind their backs. Angered, the pair ask Kripke to help them get their own back on Sheldon, much to his annoyance. Meanwhile, Bernadette suspects that Ruchi might be trying to steal her job while she is on bed rest, so she asks Raj to investigate for her, putting him in a very awkward position. Dean Norris guest stars.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon tries to teach the other guys a lesson after they cut him out of a potentially valuable Bitcoin investment seven years ago.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: It's Thanksgiving, and Chris talks John into having a holiday dinner - just the two of them, but it soon turns into a much bigger, family affair.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier takes a date to Bora Bora and runs into someone unexpected.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Jealousy rears its ugly head when Frasier bumps into Lilith and her new boyfriend while vacationing with his new girlfriend.

programme.title: Entertainment Tonight
programme.desc: Still the gold standard in entertainment news, ET delivers daily exclusives, red carpet coverage, and celebrity interviews.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: Synopsis.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: A show that offers a variety of product demonstrations and great deals for consumers looking to buy them.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: A show that offers a variety of product demonstrations and great deals for consumers looking to buy them.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: A show that offers a variety of product demonstrations and great deals for consumers looking to buy them.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: A show that offers a variety of product demonstrations and great deals for consumers looking to buy them.

programme.title: The Bold & The Beautiful
programme.desc: Bill confronts Ridge over what he's done to Katie. Donna blindsides Brooke with news about Eric.

programme.title: The Bold & The Beautiful
programme.desc: Deacon, Hope, and Deke spend time together. Ridge and Eric have a powerful conversation at the office. Deacon visits Taylor and their chemistry is palpable.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: A show that offers a variety of product demonstrations and great deals for consumers looking to buy them.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: A show that offers a variety of product demonstrations and great deals for consumers looking to buy them.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: A show that offers a variety of product demonstrations and great deals for consumers looking to buy them.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: A show that offers a variety of product demonstrations and great deals for consumers looking to buy them.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: A show that offers a variety of product demonstrations and great deals for consumers looking to buy them.

programme.title: Good Chef Bad Chef
programme.desc: Mike, Jacq, Tim and Jo create stunning dishes, balancing bold flavours and wholesome ingredients. Every meal is a delight. What will you try first?

programme.title: Farm To Fork
programme.desc: Michael Weldon, Louis Tikaram and Brent Draper take you on a food journey across Australia seeking the finest local produce and share inspiring recipe ideas to ignite your passion for cooking at home.

programme.title: Entertainment Tonight
programme.desc: Still the gold standard in entertainment news, ET delivers daily exclusives, red carpet coverage, and celebrity interviews.

programme.title: The Late Show With Stephen Colbert
programme.desc: Join The Late Show host Stephen Colbert as he shares his views on a number of trending news updates and catches up with guests to engage in candid conversations.

programme.title: The Late Show With Stephen Colbert
programme.desc: Join The Late Show host Stephen Colbert as he shares his views on a number of trending news updates and catches up with guests to engage in candid conversations.

programme.title: The Bold & The Beautiful
programme.desc: The fashion industry is ruled by the Forrester family in Beverly Hills. But behind the glitz and glamor, the Forresters encounter many hardships, including divorces, alcoholism, and deaths.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Steve Harvey assumes the hosting duties for this daytime game show in which five members of one family are pitted against five members of another family.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal
programme.desc: Join Grant Denyer in Deal or No Deal, the high-pressure, high-stakes game of risk versus reward where contestants must beat the Banker to win a huge cash prize of $100,000.

programme.title: Millionaire Hot Seat
programme.desc: Amongst the six competing for one million dollars in this episode is retired teacher Xenia and publicist Sarah.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: It's Thanksgiving, and Chris talks John into having a holiday dinner - just the two of them, but it soon turns into a much bigger, family affair.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier takes a date to Bora Bora and runs into someone unexpected.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Jealousy rears its ugly head when Frasier bumps into Lilith and her new boyfriend while vacationing with his new girlfriend.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Wil Wheaton go head to head for the role of the new Professor Proton. Penny takes care of Halley when Bernadette and Howard are on bed rest.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Bert asks Sheldon to collaborate on a project with him, Sheldon becomes worried about others finding out because he thinks geology is beneath him. Raj seeks advice after reconnecting with Ruchi.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One In Barbados - Part One
programme.desc: The gang heads to Barbados for a paleontology convention where Ross is the keynote speaker; David prepares to propose to Phoebe, but ex-boyfriend Mike is not yet out of the picture.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One In Barbados - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. On the first hot day since their arrival in Barbados, the pals attend Ross's lecture, which is well received by his colleagues. Ross and Joey experience a change of fortunes, while Monica and Mike take part in a marathon ping-pong match, leaving Chandler irritated and Phoebe smitten.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One After Joey And Rachel Kiss
programme.desc: In Barbados, Monica, Chandler and Phoebe eavesdrop on their friends' passionate encounters; Monica styles her hair to look like a blowfish; Phoebe and Mike rekindle their romance.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Chock Full 'o Nuts: A large number of street people flock about the diner and John's office. Jake's grandmother leaves him $25,000.

programme.title: Good Chef Bad Chef
programme.desc: Good Chef Bad Chef presents viewers with a range of both healthy and indulgent recipes and meal ideas and lets them decide what is right for them.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier runs into Martin's old partner, Artie. He convinces Martin, who hasn't spoken with Artie in years, to mend their differences. Also, Maris has a facelift.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles encounter bullies from their school days, but both approach the awkward reunion very differently.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Howard are furious when they learn that Sheldon went to work with the military behind their backs. Angered, the pair ask Kripke to help them get their own back on Sheldon, much to his annoyance. Meanwhile, Bernadette suspects that Ruchi might be trying to steal her job while she is on bed rest, so she asks Raj to investigate for her, putting him in a very awkward position. Dean Norris guest stars.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon tries to teach the other guys a lesson after they cut him out of a potentially valuable Bitcoin investment seven years ago.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With The Late Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Monica reluctantly agrees to cook Thanksgiving dinner, but locks everyone out when they turn up late as Joey and Ross went to a hockey game while Rachel and Phoebe took Emma to a baby beauty contest. Monica also receives some adoption news.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With The Birth Mother
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler are forced to pretend to be a reverend and a doctor when their prospective child's birth mother gets the wrong end of the stick. Meanwhile, Joey's date with Phoebe's friend doesn't go well, and Ross is left with an inappropriate outfit for a date with a sexy salesgirl.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Gets Caught
programme.desc: When Rachel and Phoebe catch Chandler getting into a car with a blonde woman, they assume he is having an affair.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy try to eliminate stress from the planning of their wedding by applying mathematics to the process. Meanwhile, Raj `breaks up\.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Howard plan respective birthday celebrations for Amy and Halley. A letter from his brother makes Leonard feel anxious about his own lack of accomplishments. The series takes a mid-season break until the new year.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy pick their best-man and maid of honour by experimenting on the gang. Meanwhile, Leonard's self-confidence is still badly damaged after reading his brother's Christmas letter.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: A woman who moves into an apartment across the hall from two brilliant but socially awkward physicists shows them how little they know about life outside of the laboratory.

programme.title: The Cheap Seats
programme.desc: Taking a fun look at the week that was are The Cheap Seats hosts Melanie Bracewell and Tim McDonald.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles encounter bullies from their school days, but both approach the awkward reunion very differently.

programme.title: Entertainment Tonight
programme.desc: Still the gold standard in entertainment news, ET delivers daily exclusives, red carpet coverage, and celebrity interviews.

programme.title: The Bold & The Beautiful
programme.desc: Steffy explains to Finn her deep connection to Eric. Everyone worries about Eric's health.

programme.title: The Bold & The Beautiful
programme.desc: Eric's shocked emotions inflate more and more as Ridge doesn't back down. Carter attempts to put himself in Eric's shoes.

programme.desc: Mike, Jacq, Tim and Jo create stunning dishes, balancing bold flavours and wholesome ingredients. Every meal is a delight. What will you try first?

programme.title: Farm To Fork
programme.desc: Packed with inspiring recipes we will take you on a food journey around Australia and meet some of our hardworking Australian farmers. Hosted by Courtney Roulston, Michael Weldon and Louis Tikaram.

programme.desc: Still the gold standard in entertainment news, ET delivers daily exclusives, red carpet coverage, and celebrity interviews.

programme.title: The Late Show With Stephen Colbert
programme.desc: Join The Late Show host Stephen Colbert as he shares his views on a number of trending news updates and catches up with guests to engage in candid conversations.

programme.title: The Late Show With Stephen Colbert
programme.desc: Join The Late Show host Stephen Colbert as he shares his views on a number of trending news updates and catches up with guests to engage in candid conversations.

programme.title: The Bold & The Beautiful
programme.desc: The fashion industry is ruled by the Forrester family in Beverly Hills. But behind the glitz and glamor, the Forresters encounter many hardships, including divorces, alcoholism, and deaths.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Steve Harvey hosts Family Feud, bringing hilarious moments and families together to compete for a chance to win up to $20,000 by guessing the most popular answers to questions.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal
programme.desc: Join Grant Denyer in Deal or No Deal, the high-pressure, high-stakes game of risk versus reward where contestants must beat the Banker to win a huge cash prize of $100,000.

programme.title: Millionaire Hot Seat
programme.desc: In this episode, tour guides and Eurovision fanatics are among the six contestants vying for the life changing prize money.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Chock Full 'o Nuts: A large number of street people flock about the diner and John's office. Jake's grandmother leaves him $25,000.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier runs into Martin's old partner, Artie. He convinces Martin, who hasn't spoken with Artie in years, to mend their differences. Also, Maris has a facelift.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles encounter bullies from their school days, but both approach the awkward reunion very differently.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy try to eliminate stress from the planning of their wedding by applying mathematics to the process. Meanwhile, Raj `breaks up\.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Howard plan respective birthday celebrations for Amy and Halley. A letter from his brother makes Leonard feel anxious about his own lack of accomplishments. The series takes a mid-season break until the new year.
